name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn Louisville, Kentucky — FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C...
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. was founded and is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas. The company operates as the leading international pawn store operator, serving cash and credit-constrained consumers across North America, Latin America, the United Kingdom, and Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. FirstCash is publicly traded and is included in both the Standard & Poor's MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index, employing approximately 22,000 people globally.

FirstCash's primary business involves operating retail pawn locations that buy, sell, and loan against a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company specializes in making small non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property—meaning borrowers are not personally liable if they cannot repay the loan. Beyond pawn operations, FirstCash also offers layaway services (with 10% down payment options), gold and precious metal buying, and retail sales of merchandise. Through its subsidiary AFF, the company provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions across a network of over 15,000 merchant partner locations.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale—operating more than 3,300 retail locations internationally—and its dual focus on both pawn lending and point-of-sale payment solutions through AFF. The company provides immediate cash for items of value and offers non-recourse loans, meaning borrowers have no personal liability beyond losing the pledged item. Their extensive store locator and inventory systems allow customers to search for specific items or locations conveniently. The company also emphasizes the simplicity and speed of pawn loans as an alternative to traditional credit.

As a pawn lender, FirstCash serves consumers who need emergency cash quickly but may lack access to traditional credit. The non-recourse nature of pawn loans protects borrowers from debt collection, though loan terms and interest rates are not disclosed on the website. Pawn loans are fundamentally collateral-based and involve the risk of losing pledged items if loans are not repaid. The company's extensive operations and S&P MidCap 400 listing indicate financial stability, though individual pawn loan terms and rates should be verified at specific locations before borrowing.
pros: Non-recourse pawn loans—borrowers have no personal liability beyond losing the pledged item
Immediate cash payment on-the-spot for items of value with no credit check required
3,300+ retail locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., U.K., and Latin America for convenient access
Wide variety of merchandise accepted (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option for purchases
Gold and precious metal buying service for converting items to immediate cash
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 Index) indicating financial stability and transparency
Online store locator and inventory search to find items or nearest location
cons: No interest rates or loan terms disclosed on website—borrowers must visit stores for pricing details
Risk of losing pledged personal property if loan cannot be repaid by deadline
Pawn loans carry higher effective interest rates compared to traditional bank loans or credit lines
Limited to collateral-based lending—cannot borrow against income or creditworthiness alone
Layaway and retail sales have markup markings typical of pawn business models
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with no access to traditional credit or credit score
Individuals with items of value (jewelry, electronics, tools) they can temporarily part with
People seeking fast loans without credit checks or personal liability beyond collateral loss
Shoppers looking for discounted merchandise or affordable layaway purchasing options
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who own valuable items they can pledge as collateral and cannot access traditional credit. The critical caveat is that pawn loans involve risk of losing the pledged property if repayment deadlines are missed, and actual loan terms, interest rates, and repayment periods must be obtained directly from individual store locations as they are not published on the corporate website.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with non-recourse terms
Gold and precious metal buying (gold, silver, platinum purchase for cash)
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Store locator and inventory search across 3,300+ locations
Retail finance payment solutions (through AFF partnership network of 15,000+ merchants)
Buy and sell a wide variety of merchandise
Multiple location access across U.S., U.K., Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador
